# Test fixture data lives here.
# Small sample CSV/JSON files representing IPEDS and other datasets.
# Used by tests/test_loaders.py to test data pipeline logic without real files.
#
# Naming convention:
#   ipeds_hd_sample.csv       — sample IPEDS HD (institution directory) rows
#   ipeds_c_sample.csv        — sample IPEDS completions rows
#   cip_soc_sample.csv        — sample CIP→SOC crosswalk rows
